title: Auction System with Bidding Logic & Timers + Barter/Trade Offer System

requirements.summary: Create an Auctions listing page at /auctions that displays all active auctions in a grid with live countdown timers
acceptanceCriteria: Auctions page is accessible at /auctions
Each card shows current bid, time remaining (days/hours/minutes/seconds), and bid count
Countdown timer updates every second in real time
Auctions that have ended are visually marked as ended
Header navigation includes an 'Auctions' link
Page shows a loading skeleton while data is fetched

file_operations.description: Create a page component that fetches active auctions using useListActiveAuctions hook and renders them in a responsive grid. Include loading skeletons and empty state when no auctions exist.

Create a card component displaying product image from frontend/public/assets/generated/product-placeholder.dim_600x600.png as fallback, product name, current highest bid, starting price, bid count, and a live countdown timer using React hooks (useEffect with setInterval) that updates every second. Mark ended auctions visually with badge or overlay. Card is clickable and navigates to /auctions/$auctionId.
Create a grid container component that renders multiple AuctionCard components in a responsive grid layout, with loading skeleton states.
Add an 'Auctions' navigation link to the desktop and mobile navigation menus that routes to /auctions.
Register route /auctions that renders the Auctions page component in the TanStack Router configuration.

requirements.summary: Create an Auction Detail page at /auctions/$auctionId with full auction info, bid history, live countdown, and bid submission form
acceptanceCriteria: Route /auctions/$auctionId renders auction details
Bid input is disabled for unauthenticated users with a prompt to log in
Bid input is disabled and shows 'Auction Ended' when endTime has passed
Placing a bid below or equal to current bid shows an inline error
Successful bid updates the displayed current bid and bid history without full page reload
Ended auctions display winner principal and final bid amount
Countdown timer is visible and updates every second

file_operations.description: Create a page component that extracts auctionId from route params, fetches auction data using useGetAuction hook, and displays full product details, current bid, winner info (if ended), bid history list, and live countdown timer. Show loading skeleton during fetch.

Create a form component with a controlled input for bid amount and a 'Place Bid' button. Disable and show appropriate messages for unauthenticated users or ended auctions. Use usePlaceBid mutation hook with optimistic update and error handling for validation failures (bid too low, auction ended). Show inline validation errors and success toast on successful bid.

Create a list component that displays bid history entries with bidder principal (truncated to first 8 and last 4 characters), bid amount formatted as currency, and timestamp formatted as relative time. Show empty state when no bids exist.

Create a reusable countdown timer component that accepts endTime timestamp and displays remaining time in days, hours, minutes, and seconds format, updating every second via useEffect/setInterval. Show 'Ended' state when time has passed.
Register route /auctions/$auctionId that renders the AuctionDetail page component in the TanStack Router configuration.

requirements.summary: Add auction management capabilities to the Vendor Dashboard for creating and managing auctions
acceptanceCriteria: Vendor Dashboard has an 'Auctions' section or tab
Create Auction form allows selecting a product, entering starting price, and setting duration
Vendor's auction list shows status, current bid, and countdown or end time
Cancel button is shown only for active auctions
Ended auctions display winner information

file_operations.description: Create a panel component that displays the vendor's auctions using useListAuctionsByVendor hook. Show a table or card list with auction status, current bid, countdown timer for active auctions, end time for ended auctions, and winner info when available. Include a 'Create Auction' button that opens the create form dialog. For active auctions, show a cancel button that calls useCancelAuction mutation with confirmation dialog.

Create a form component with product select dropdown (populated from vendor's products), starting price input, and auction duration input (in hours). Use useCreateAuction mutation hook to submit. Show validation errors and success toast. Close dialog on successful creation.
Add VendorAuctionsPanel component as a new section or tab in the vendor dashboard layout, positioned after the product management link and before payouts panel.

requirements.summary: Add auction oversight to the Admin Dashboard for viewing and managing all auctions
acceptanceCriteria: Admin Dashboard includes an 'Auction Management' panel
Table lists all auctions with vendor, product, current bid, end time, status
Cancel action is available for active auctions
Finalize action is available for ended but unfinalized auctions
Actions reflect immediately in the table after completion

file_operations.description: Create an admin panel component that fetches all auctions using useListAllAuctions hook and displays them in a sortable table with columns for vendor principal (truncated), product name, current bid, end time, and status badge. Include action buttons: Cancel for active auctions (calls useCancelAuction with admin privileges) and Finalize for ended unfinalized auctions (calls useFinalizeAuction). Show loading skeleton and handle errors with toast notifications. Refetch data after successful actions.
Create a badge component that renders color-coded labels for auction status values (active: green, ended: blue, cancelled: gray) similar to OrderStatusBadge pattern.
Add AuctionManagementPanel component as a new section in the admin dashboard, positioned after the PayoutManagementPanel.

requirements.summary: Create a Trade Offers page at /trade-offers with incoming and outgoing tabs showing trade offer cards with contextual actions
acceptanceCriteria: Route /trade-offers is accessible only to authenticated users
Incoming and Outgoing tabs each show relevant offers
Status badge uses color coding: pending (yellow), accepted (green), rejected (red), cancelled (gray), completed (teal)
Accept, Reject, Cancel, and Counter actions are contextually shown per role
Counter offer opens a form pre-filled with the original offer's items for editing
Empty states are shown when no offers exist in each tab

file_operations.description: Create a page component that requires authentication (redirect to login if not authenticated). Display two tabs using shadcn/ui Tabs component: 'Incoming Offers' and 'Outgoing Offers'. Fetch offers using useListTradeOffersForUser hook and filter into incoming (where user is receiver) and outgoing (where user is initiator) arrays. Render TradeOfferGrid for each tab with appropriate empty states.

Create a card component displaying offered items list (product names and quantities), requested items list, optional cash adjustment (formatted as currency with + or - sign), status badge, and contextual action buttons. For incoming offers where user is receiver and status is pending: show Accept and Reject buttons. For outgoing offers where user is initiator and status is pending: show Cancel button. For any pending offer: show Counter button. All buttons use appropriate mutation hooks (useAcceptTradeOffer, useRejectTradeOffer, useCancelTradeOffer, and open CounterOfferForm dialog). Show confirmation dialogs for destructive actions.
Create a grid container component that renders multiple TradeOfferCard components in a responsive grid layout with loading skeletons and empty state message when no offers exist.
Create a badge component that renders color-coded labels for trade offer status: pending (yellow/amber), accepted (green), rejected (red), cancelled (gray), completed (teal/cyan).
Add a 'Trade Offers' link to the authenticated user profile dropdown menu that navigates to /trade-offers, positioned after 'My Orders' link.
Register route /trade-offers that renders the TradeOffers page component in the TanStack Router configuration.

requirements.summary: Create a 'New Trade Offer' flow for initiating trade offers with product selection and receiver specification
acceptanceCriteria: New Trade Offer form allows selecting offered products from the user's owned/purchased inventory
Requested items can be searched or entered by product ID
Optional cash adjustment field accepts positive or negative integers
Receiver selection accepts a valid principal ID
Form validates that at least one offered item and one requested item are present before submission
Submission success navigates to the Trade Offers page with a toast notification

file_operations.description: Create a multi-section form component with: 1) Offered items section with product multi-select (from user's inventory/purchased products) and quantity inputs. 2) Requested items section with product search/select and quantity inputs. 3) Optional cash adjustment input accepting positive or negative integers. 4) Receiver principal ID input with validation. Include form validation requiring at least one offered and one requested item. Use useCreateTradeOffer mutation hook to submit. Navigate to /trade-offers with success toast on completion.
Create a page component that requires authentication and renders the NewTradeOfferForm component with appropriate page layout and heading.
Add a 'Create Trade Offer' button in the page header that navigates to /trade-offers/new route.
Register route /trade-offers/new that renders the NewTradeOffer page component in the TanStack Router configuration.

requirements.summary: Add a Trade Offer management panel to the Admin Dashboard for viewing and managing all trade offers
acceptanceCriteria: Admin Dashboard includes a 'Trade Offer Management' panel
Table lists all trade offers with initiator, receiver, status, and timestamps
Cancel action is available for pending offers
Panel is visible to admin and moderator roles only
Table supports sorting by status and creation date

file_operations.description: Create an admin panel component that fetches all trade offers using useListAllTradeOffers hook (admin/moderator only) and displays them in a sortable table with columns for offer ID, initiator principal (truncated), receiver principal (truncated), status badge, offered items count, requested items count, and creation date (formatted). Include a Cancel action button for pending offers that calls useCancelTradeOffer mutation. Support sorting by status and creation date. Show loading skeleton and handle errors with toast notifications.
Add TradeOfferManagementPanel component as a new section in the admin dashboard, positioned after the AuctionManagementPanel.

requirements.summary: Add React Query hooks for all auction and trade offer backend capabilities
acceptanceCriteria: Each hook correctly calls the corresponding backend actor function
Query hooks use appropriate cache keys and invalidation on mutation success
Mutation hooks expose isLoading, isError, and error states
useListActiveAuctions refetches on a short interval (e.g., every 30 seconds) to keep countdown data fresh

file_operations.description: Add React Query hooks for auction operations: useListActiveAuctions (with refetchInterval: 30000 for fresh countdown data), useGetAuction (queryKey: ['auction', auctionId]), useListAuctionsByVendor (queryKey: ['vendorAuctions', vendorId]), useListAllAuctions (queryKey: ['allAuctions'], admin only), useCreateAuction (mutation, invalidates vendorAuctions and allAuctions), usePlaceBid (mutation, invalidates specific auction query and activeAuctions), useCancelAuction (mutation, invalidates relevant auction queries), useFinalizeAuction (mutation, invalidates relevant auction queries). Add hooks for trade offer operations: useListTradeOffersForUser (queryKey: ['tradeOffers', userId]), useListAllTradeOffers (queryKey: ['allTradeOffers'], admin/moderator only), useCreateTradeOffer (mutation, invalidates tradeOffers), useAcceptTradeOffer (mutation, invalidates tradeOffers and allTradeOffers), useRejectTradeOffer (mutation, invalidates tradeOffers), useCancelTradeOffer (mutation, invalidates tradeOffers and allTradeOffers), useCounterTradeOffer (mutation, invalidates tradeOffers and allTradeOffers). All mutations include proper error handling, loading states, and success toast notifications.
